register.title: Tenant Turnover on Lease Expiry (Apr 2027)
register.description: Swiss analyst tenant may relocate on lease expiry; typical re-let period in Dubai Marina is 30–45 days, minimal void risk.

register.title: New Supply Pipeline in Dubai Marina
register.description: ~8,000 new units in Dubai Marina pipeline 2025–2027 could compress rents; Marina Gate I premium partially insulates.

register.title: Service Charge Escalation
register.description: RERA-regulated service charges could increase above RERA index; Select Group has been within RERA limits historically.

register.title: UAE Regulatory — Foreign Ownership
register.description: UAE continues to expand freehold zones; no risk to existing ownership. BVI structure adds minor annual compliance cost.

scenarios.name: 45-Day Void on Tenant Turnover
scenarios.verdict: Manageable — 45-day void costs ~$5,200 lost rent. Dubai Marina demand is robust; re-let at AED 143K–148K on renewal likely.

scenarios.name: Rental Market Correction –10%
scenarios.verdict: AED 138K drops to AED 124K; NOI reduces from $37.6K to ~$33.9K. Still strong positive carry. Low probability given current demand.

mitigationPlan.action: Brief Better Homes / Espace Real Estate for renewal advisory in January 2027; target AED 143K–148K
